title: cynoglossum germanicum var. hungaricum
intro: Cynoglossum germanicum var. hungaricum, commonly known as the German gypsy flower, is a perennial plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, herbal preparations of German gypsy flower include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for various uses.
